response.justification: A strong, versatile senior/staff software engineer with ~13 years of experience, solid cloud (AWS CDK), TypeScript/Node.js depth, excellent engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD), and mentoring/teaching background. However, the role is a Staff GenAI specialist requiring 8+ years building production AI solutions, RAG/vector database experience, and multi-agent frameworks — none of which are demonstrated. AI exposure is recent and shallow (MCP tooling and 'agentic workflows' since April 2025), with no Python, no RAG, and no LLM evaluation/optimization work shown. Worth a conversation to probe the recent AI infrastructure work, but the core GenAI qualifications are largely unmet.
strengths: Deep full-stack and cross-domain engineering experience with strong practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based)
Recent hands-on exposure to MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling
Cloud (AWS CDK) and high-throughput data integration background, plus mentoring/teaching track record
concerns: No demonstrated RAG, vector database, or LLM performance/optimization experience
AI/GenAI experience is minimal and recent (~1 year), far short of 8+ years building production AI
No Python shown; AI work is described vaguely without production-grade outcomes

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering and cloud breadth
